fields.description: Most definitions of cars state that they run primarily on roads, seat 1-8 people, have four wheels, and mainly transport people rather than cargo. There are over 1.6 billion cars in use worldwide as of 2025.
A large motor vehicle, having a long body, equipped with seats or benches for passengers, usually operating as part of a scheduled service; omnibus.

A tractor is a vehicle that's used on a farm or work site, often to pull a trailer or other equipment. A farmer might use a tractor to pull a plow through her corn field before planting. Tractors typically have two large wheels in back, and smaller wheels in front.

A bicycle, also called a pedal cycle, bike, push-bike or cycle, is a human-powered or motor-assisted, pedal-driven, single-track vehicle, with two wheels attached to a frame, one behind the other. A bicycle rider is called a cyclist, or bicyclist.

fields.first_line_text: Agriculture is one of the strongest pillars of our country’s economic and social growth.It provides food, raw materials, and employment, which is why a large part rural India still depends on farming.
fields.second_line_text: Along with traditional practices, modern methods like drip irrigation, organic farming, and advanced machinery are helping farmers increase productivity. Despite challenges such as climate change and water scarcity, farmers continue to adapt by using new techniques and government schemes to improve their livelihood.

fields.info_text: A tractor is a powerful farming vehicle used for ploughing, tilling, and hauling. It features a diesel engine, PTO, gears, and hydraulic systems.
Used to prepare soil by breaking, mixing, and leveling land. Includes rotavators, cultivators, ploughs, and harrows.
Oxen are trained cattle used for ploughing and traditional farming where machines cannot operate efficiently.
Chemical products used to protect crops, improve plant health, and increase yield when applied correctly.
Provides essential nutrients like nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium to improve soil health and productivity.
Used to evenly apply pesticides, fertilizers, and water. Available in manual, battery, and motorized types.

fields.name: Cultivator
fields.description: A cultivator is primarily used to loosen and aerate the topsoil, uproot young weeds, and mix soil amendments such as fertilizer or compost into the seed zone. It is commonly used after primary tillage (ploughing) to create a fine, even seedbed suitable for sowing. Modern tractor-mounted cultivators come with multiple tines; wider machines and stronger frames increase field coverage and durability.
fields.price: Approx. Price (India): ₹13,000 – ₹165,000, depending on the number of tines, working width and whether it is a simple tine cultivator or a heavy-duty multi-row model.

fields.name: Disc Harrow
fields.description: A disc harrow is built with concave steel discs arranged in gangs that cut, lift and mix surface soil and crop residues. It is effective at breaking clods after ploughing, chopping residues and producing a level, workable seedbed. Disc harrows perform well in sticky or stony soils where mouldboard ploughs struggle, and their modular construction allows for different gang angles or disc sizes to suit soil conditions.
fields.price: Approx. Price (India): ₹20,000 – ₹220,000 depending on working width, disc size, number of gangs and brand.

fields.name: Rotavator (Rotary Tiller)
fields.description: A rotavator (rotary tiller) uses rotating blades mounted on a horizontal shaft to pulverize and mix the soil into a fine tilth. It is ideal for producing a smooth, uniform seedbed quickly, and mixes crop residues and manures thoroughly into the topsoil. Rotavators save time compared to multiple passes with conventional implements, but they require appropriate tractor horsepower and careful adjustment of depth to avoid over-working the soil.
fields.price: Approx. Price (India): ₹50,000 – ₹290,000 depending on working width, gearbox quality and manufacturer.

fields.name: Subsoiler
fields.description: A subsoiler is designed to penetrate and fracture compacted soil layers well below the surface without inverting the topsoil. It relieves hardpans, improves drainage, root penetration and air exchange in the sub-soil, and is used where repeated operations or traffic have caused compaction. Subsoilers vary by shank shape, depth capability and spring/ejector protection systems to prevent damage from rocks.
fields.price: Approx. Price (India): ₹28,000 – ₹2,00,000 depending on number of shanks, build quality and protection mechanism.

fields.name: Tractor Trolley (Trailer)
fields.description: A tractor trolley (or trailer) is used for transporting harvested crops, inputs like fertilizer and seed, tools and other materials on the farm. Built for heavy loads, trolleys can have tipping mechanisms for easy unloading, hydraulic lifts, and reinforced chassis for durability. Choosing the right capacity and suspension is important to match field conditions and tractor towing ability.
fields.price: Approx. Price (India): ₹45,000 – ₹3,50,000 depending on capacity, tipping features and build standard.

fields.name: Chisel Plough
fields.description: A chisel plough is used for primary tillage to break and loosen hard soil without inverting it. Its curved heavy-duty shanks penetrate deep to shatter compact layers, improve water infiltration and promote strong root growth. It is ideal for reclaiming hard fields and reducing plough-pan formation.
fields.price: Approx. Price (India): ₹35,000 – ₹1,80,000 depending on number of shanks, frame strength and brand.

fields.name: Gir
fields.description: This ox is known for its calm nature, strong working ability and adaptability to farm work.

fields.name: Kankrej
fields.description: This ox is known for its endurance, strong frame and reliable performance in farming work.

fields.name: Tharparkar
fields.description: This ox is known for its heat tolerance, steady movement and dependable performance in farming.

fields.name: Sahiwal
fields.description: This ox is known for its gentle behavior, easy training and steady performance in farming.

fields.name: Malvi
fields.description: This ox is known for its sturdy build, heavy work capacity and low maintenance needs.

fields.name: Ongole
fields.description: This ox is known for its power, heat tolerance and dependable performance in farming work.

fields.name: Herbicide
fields.short_description: Reliable weed control for field and crops
fields.description: Controls a wide spectrum of weeds, improving crop competitiveness and yields. Use following crop-specific guidance and safety precautions.

fields.name: Fungicide
fields.description: Effective control of fungal pathogens to reduce crop loss. Follow mixing and application instructions carefully for best results.

fields.name: Insecticide
fields.short_description: Targeted insect control for healthy crops
fields.description: Controls key insect pests that damage foliage and yield. Observe pre-harvest intervals and PPE recommendations.

fields.name: Bactericide
fields.description: Protects crops from bacterial diseases and helps maintain healthy yields. Always follow label instructions and recommended dosages for safe use.

fields.name: Rodenticide
fields.short_description: Rodent control for storage and field areas
fields.description: Designed to reduce rodent damage in storage and field environments. Keep away from children and non-target animals.

fields.name: Plant Growth Regulator
fields.description: Plant Growth Regulations such as Auxins, Gibberellins, Cytokinins and Ethylene regulators support flowering, fruit development and yield.

fields.name: Manual Spray Pump
fields.description: Reliable and cost-effective for small farms, nurseries, and home gardens.

fields.name: Battery Spray Pump
fields.description: Modern pumps designed for reduced labor and consistent pressure distribution.

fields.name: Power Spray Pump
fields.description: Engine-driven pumps for rapid spraying in large-scale commercial operations.

fields.crop_Soil: Medium to light, good organic matter

fields.crop_Fertilizer: Basal DAP ~100 kg/ha; top-dress urea split doses

fields.crop_Soil: Light sandy to medium, good drainage

fields.crop_Sowing: Summer Apr - Jun; Kharif Jun - Jul

fields.crop_season: Feb - Mar or Jun - Jul planting

fields.crop_Sowing: Feb - Jun or Oct - Dec depending on method

fields.crop_Soil: Medium to heavy with organic matter

fields.crop_Sowing: Oct - Dec or Jun - Jul (in some areas)
